name: Liu Dai (Gongshan)
page_title: Liu Dai (Gongshan) 劉岱 (公山) [Liu Dai] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Dies in 192 facing Turbans, the one defeated by Liu Bei is not the same guy that attacked Qiao Miao as suggested in the novel.

	The family, personal, and style names recorded for this Liu Dai (Gongshan 公山) are identical to those of 劉岱 (公山)" data-color="rgb(41,41,109)" data-summa="Fought Liu Bei with Wang Zhong but had no success." data-factions="Wei">Liu Dai (Gongshan) 劉岱 (公山). The source for the other “Gongshan” is a Pei Songzhi Sanguozhi annotation of the Martial Stories of Wei (魏武故事), but may be in error due to confusing these distinct individuals.

full_text:
Liu Dai (Gongshan) 劉岱 (公山)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Dai (劉岱), styledGongshan (公山). Governor of Yan. Attacked the Qingzhou Yellow Scarves, but was killed. Liu Dai lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
Return to theThree Kingdoms Encyclopediaor browse theEncyclopedia Directory.
